name: How much is AI visibility worth for my San Diego firm?

mainEntity.name: How much is AI visibility worth for my San Diego firm?

acceptedAnswer.description: **$10K-$50K/year in leads for consumer practices, based on market size.** Free ongoing vs. ad costs. **Key factors:** 1) Location/competition; 2) Practice; 3) Listing fees ($1-5K); 4) Conversion. Calculate via audits, invest accordingly. High ROI potential.[3]
